summary: Iteration 21 — both backend & frontend tested for AI Chef Assistant + Local Sub-products feature. 16/16 backend pytest cases pass (11 new + 5 regression). Frontend e2e flows verified: login as admin/220066 → /admin/recipes shows purple 'Распознать из текста' button (data-testid='ai-parse-btn') and 'Мои п/ф' tab (data-testid='tab-local-sp'); AI parse dialog correctly parses two-block sample and renders 'ПОЛУФАБРИКАТ Соус кукуруза п/ф' + 'БЛЮДО Паста с креветками' with action buttons (Сохранить как лок. п/ф, Открыть в Песочнице). Local SP creation form (name+yield+save) works end-to-end and the new SP appears in Sandbox ingredient picker with the blue 'лок. п/ф' badge. Caffesta unavailable in preview is handled gracefully (cost-catalog still serves local subproducts; ai-parse still works).

ui_bugs.issue: React warning 'Encountered two children with the same key, null' — the picker uses key={p.caffesta_product_id} which is null for ALL local sub-products, so when there are 2+ local SPs in the catalog they collide. Line 1500 in the same file already does it correctly with `${p.caffesta_product_id || p.local_subproduct_id}`. Apply the same pattern to lines 923 and 1206.

action_items: Fix React duplicate-key warning in RecipeCalculatorPage.jsx lines 923 and 1206 — change `key={p.caffesta_product_id}` to `key={p.caffesta_product_id || p.local_subproduct_id || p.name}` (line 1500 already uses the correct pattern, just propagate it).
(optional) Consider adding a delete confirmation toast/dialog for local sub-products — current delete button removes immediately. Not a bug, just UX.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend cost_control.py: local subproducts CRUD is clean — uses uuid for ids, excludes _id in projections, recomputes total_cost+cost_per_kg server-side on POST/PUT (good defense in depth). Empty-name validation returns 400, missing id returns 404, delete returns {ok,deleted,in_use_recipes} as documented.

Backend cost-catalog graceful degradation when Caffesta is unavailable: returns {ok:true, data:[<local_subproducts only>]} instead of failing — this is the correct behavior the review_request asked for. Verified in test_cost_catalog_includes_local_subproducts.

ai-parse endpoint: accepts {text} POST, validates non-empty (400 on whitespace-only), returns {blocks, stats} as documented. Block kind heuristic (last block = dish, earlier = subproduct) works as specified. Inline-defined subproducts are matched in subsequent blocks via fuzzy name match — verified in two tests.

Frontend RecipeCalculatorPage.jsx is 1684 lines, exceeding the 700-line guideline. Already contains AIParseDialog, LocalSubproductsTab, LocalSubproductForm, IngredientPicker, multiple modals — would benefit from extraction into separate files. Not a blocker but tech debt.

Recipe parser regression file (test_recipe_parser.py) is correctly written and stable; covers two-block parsing, yo-normalization, unit factor defaulting to grams, empty input, and single-block-as-dish heuristic.

Minor: lines 923 and 1206 in RecipeCalculatorPage.jsx have the duplicate React-key bug described above. Line 1500 in the SAME file already implements the fix correctly, so it is clearly a copy-paste oversight from when local SPs were added to the picker.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_local_subproducts_and_ai_parse.py (new — 11 tests covering CRUD + ai-parse + cost-catalog integration)

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows (AI parse dialog renders blocks + buttons, Local SP create→catalog round-trip works, blue 'лок. п/ф' badge confirmed)

test_credentials: admin/220066 (superadmin) — used as specified. Default restaurant_id resolved from /api/auth/login response (restaurants[0].id).
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ was created and cleaned up after each test class via DELETE. One non-prefixed 'Соус кукуруза' (cost_per_kg=0.66) was already in DB from a previous fork — left untouched. UI-test artifact TEST_UI_Соус_iter21 was deleted via API after the test run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression is at /app/backend/tests/test_local_subproducts_and_ai_parse.py — 11 tests, includes Create→GET, Update→GET, Delete→GET-404 patterns, plus cost-catalog and ai-parse integration. Recipe parser unit suite at /app/backend/tests/test_recipe_parser.py (5 tests) is independent and very fast. Caffesta is not configured in preview env — this is expected; the new endpoints all degrade gracefully and tests rely on this. Restaurant id is resolved dynamically from login response; do not hardcode.
rca of the issue: The React duplicate-key warning during ingredient picking is caused by `key={p.caffesta_product_id}` at RecipeCalculatorPage.jsx:923 and :1206. For local sub-products, caffesta_product_id is null. With ≥2 local SPs in catalog, multiple list children get key=null, triggering the warning and (per React docs) potentially causing item duplication/omission on re-render. Fix: use `key={p.caffesta_product_id || p.local_subproduct_id || p.name}` (mirroring the already-correct line 1500). Reproduction: login admin/220066 → /admin/recipes → 'Мои п/ф' → create 2 local SPs → switch to 'Песочница' → click 'Добавить ингредиент' → open browser console → see warning.
